visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on the face of a middle-aged man with graying hair. He has a look of concern and apprehension, with wide eyes and a slightly open mouth. The lighting is dim and has a greenish tint, casting deep shadows on his face. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The audio is filled with a tense and suspenseful musical score. A low, ominous, and atmospheric drone creates a feeling of unease and anticipation. Layered over this is a high-pitched, melancholic melody, possibly played on a synthesizer or a bowed string instrument, which adds a layer of dramatic and somber emotion to the scene. The camera cuts to a medium shot of a younger man with dark, disheveled hair and a somber expression. He is looking down and to the side. He is positioned in front of a metal grate, which is illuminated by the same greenish light. The background is dark and indistinct. The white Chinese characters remain in the top left corner.
